steps.title: Find the needed main verb
steps.content: The second half of the sentence, "students of traditional methods often only ______ such songs," must function as a full clause. It needs a finite main verb after the subject.

steps.title: Reject nonfinite forms
steps.content: Choice B is a present participle, Choice C is a perfect participial phrase, and Choice D is an infinitive. None can serve as the clause's main verb on its own. The answer is A.
